summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UCB (Upper Confidence Bound) feature for PaperSumo. All UCB features working correctly: toggle in Search page, configurable parameters, backend tournament creation with UCB mode, UCB badges on History/Tournament/Results pages, and UCB tournaments completing with significantly fewer comparisons than round-robin.
passed_tests: UCB toggle appears in Search page tournament settings
UCB parameters (exploration constant, min comparisons, max comparisons) are configurable via expandable section
Creating tournament with UCB mode sends correct config to backend
Backend correctly creates tournament with ranking_mode='ucb' and ucb_config
Tournament list (History page) shows UCB badge for UCB tournaments
Tournament progress page shows UCB Mode badge
Results page shows UCB Mode badge
UCB tournament runs and completes successfully
UCB tournament completed with 96 comparisons vs 435 for round-robin (77.9% savings)
UCB default config applied when ucb_config not provided
Search page shows estimated comparisons savings message
All navigation between pages works correctly
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test UCB tournament (06585df8-c94f-425f-a7f5-aed25c9cdaa0)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UCB feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/tournaments with ranking_mode='ucb' and ucb_config object. UCB badges display on History (data-testid='ucb-badge-{index}'), Tournament page (text='UCB Mode'), and Results page (text='UCB Mode'). UCB toggle on Search page has data-testid='ucb-toggle'. UCB parameters expandable section contains sliders for exploration_constant, min_comparisons_per_paper, and max_total_comparisons.
